title: Shulker Into Shulker
description: With this mod, you can put shulkers inside shulkers.
body:
EN-The mod is basically what the title says. 
With this mod, you can put shulkers inside shulkers. 
Mod created by [ang-xd](https://modrinth.com/user/ang-xd) and modified for new versions by me.





ES-El mod es básicamente lo que dice el título. 
Con este mod, puedes meter shulkers dentro de shulkers. 
Mod creado por [ang-xd](https://modrinth.com/user/ang-xd) y modificado para las nuevas versiones por mi.


![Shulker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14dc2fece4348ce9ded81612b954663424f6b5ac.jpeg)


![Shulker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/514fa0a1154b118454bbd9dcf12f20551f045fd8.jpeg)
